messages.content: Okay so good news - MRR hit 52K this month, up from 45K in October. That's like... 15% growth? Close enough to what Kaszek wants to see.
That's solid progress! 15% month-over-month growth is definitely moving in the right direction toward their 20% target. How are the other metrics looking?

Churn is actually looking much better - down to 3.1% from that scary 4.2% we had in October. The product team finally fixed that onboarding flow issue that was killing us. Speaking of which, I need to update la pitch deck with these numbers.
Excellent churn improvement! That's a significant drop. Are you planning any other updates to the pitch deck while you're at it?

Yeah, I'm working on version 2 now. Added that competitor slide we discussed - you know, FinFlow with their 29 dollar pricing in Mexico. Took me forever to remember their name back in October, but now I have all the intel mapped out properly.
Smart addition. Having a clear competitive landscape slide shows investors you understand the market dynamics. When are you planning to use this updated deck?

Well, that's the thing. I'm still targeting Q1 2026 for the Series A, but honestly... might need to push it a bit. These growth numbers are good but not quite at that 20% monthly yet. Andrea's bridge offer is looking more tempting cada día.
The bridge could give you more runway to hit those growth targets consistently. Have you modeled out what your MRR trajectory would need to look like to be Series A ready by Q1?

Not exactly, but rough math... if we can get to like 68K by February, maybe 78K by March? That would show the momentum Kaszek wants to see. Problem is the market is getting more competitive and - wait, sorry, my head is all over the place today. Too much coffee, not enough sleep.
No worries, that's a lot to juggle. Those MRR targets seem achievable if you can maintain the momentum. The improved churn rate should help with that growth trajectory too.

summary: Carlos updates on improved metrics with MRR at $52K and churn down to 3.1%. He's updating pitch deck V2 with competitor analysis and still targeting Q1 2026 for Series A, though considering timeline adjustments.
